title: Powers of parish governing authorities as to roads, bridges, and ditches; penalties
doc_html:
SUBPART B.  POWERS OF PARISH GOVERNING AUTHORITIES

§481.  Powers of parish governing authorities as to roads, bridges, and ditches; penalties

Parish governing authorities may pass all ordinances which they think necessary relative to roads, bridges, and ditches, and may impose such penalties to enforce them as they think proper.
doc_text:
SUBPART B.  POWERS OF PARISH GOVERNING AUTHORITIES
§481.  Powers of parish governing authorities as to roads, bridges, and ditches; penalties
Parish governing authorities may pass all ordinances which they think necessary relative to roads, bridges, and ditches, and may impose such penalties to enforce them as they think proper.
